notes: with_skill achieved 100% pass rate across all 3 evals vs 57.1% average for baseline
Biggest gap on eval 2 (vague project): skill 7/7 vs baseline 2/7 — baseline made 10+ assumptions without asking
Smallest gap on eval 3 (internal dashboard): skill 7/7 vs baseline 6/7 — baseline strong on implementation, weak on context awareness
Skill adds ~14.5s and ~6k tokens overhead — cost of recommendation table and stage review flow
deploy.sh and README.md are non-discriminating for with_skill (always generated) but discriminating for baseline (missed in 2/3 evals)
connected-boilerplate passes for both configs — Claude already wires things together, skill doesn't change this
